AuthLayout.title: Start Your Fitness Journey Today.
AuthLayout.description: Track your progress, set new goals, and get motivated with our fitness app.

LoginPage.title: Welcome Back!
LoginPage.description: Log in to track your progress and achieve your fitness goals.
LoginPage.ErrorGlobalMess: Something went wrong. Please try again.

RegistrationPage.title: Create an Account
RegistrationPage.description: Join our community and start your fitness journey today.
RegistrationPage.ErrorGlobalMess: Something went wrong. Please try again.
RegistrationPage.checkEmail: Check your email for a verification link.

ForgotPassPage.title: Reset Your Password
ForgotPassPage.description: Please provide the email address associated with your account. You’ll receive a link to create a new password.
ForgotPassPage.link: Remember your password? Back to login
ForgotPassPage.successMessage: The password reset link was sent to your email
ForgotPassPage.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ResetPasswordPage.title: Create a New Password
ResetPasswordPage.description: Your new password must be secure and easy to remember

Errors.Unauthorized: Unauthorized access. Please log in to continue.
Errors.Forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
Errors.NotFound: The requested resource was not found.
Errors.InternalServerError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
Errors.BadRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input and try again.
Errors.SomeThingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ValidationMessages.usernameMin: Nickname must be at least 4 characters
ValidationMessages.usernameMax: Nickname must be at most 20 characters
ValidationMessages.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
ValidationMessages.passwordMax: Password must be at most 20 characters

ErrorAuthPage.description: Your verification token is invalid or has expired. Please log in again to continue.

ErrorPage.title: Oops! Something Went Wrong
ErrorPage.description: It looks like the link you followed is invalid or has expired. Please try requesting a new one.
